item.name: Hells' Claw
item.description:
Protected by a thick layer of volcanic rock, this crustacean swims through the depths of the Ruby Sea to keep the flesh inside its shell from cooking.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This formidable king of the Crab Pots dons an armored shell of volcanic rock to protect itself against would-be predators. While this defense mechanism has proven successful, the sweltering heat of its once-molten carapace would cook the crustacean from the inside out had it not made a habit of launching itself into the cool depths of the Ruby Sea.
